Recent attempts leverage model-internal signals to assign finer-grained credit, but these are often point-wise heuristics that ignore the g
articles.summary: 研究LLM强化学习中的token级信用分配问题，提出基于注意力诱导信息流的方法追踪推理步骤，区分关键推理与多余内容，实现更精准的奖励分配与策略优化。

articles.title: ARM: An AutoRegressive Large Multimodal Model with Unified Discrete Representations

Our tokenizer is supervised with multiple objectives that jointly promote semantic discri
articles.summary: 介绍ARM，一种基于离散表示的自回归多模态模型，通过训练离散语义视觉分词器，在单一下一token预测框架内统一图像理解、生成和编辑任务。

articles.title: WorldOlympiad: Can Your World Model Survive a Triathlon?

articles.summary: 提出测试时梯度引导方法，将扩散/流模型策略融入强化学习流水线，避免专用损失设计，实现连续控制任务中策略的有效优化与缩放。

articles.title: Workflow-GYM: Towards Long-Horizon Evaluation of Computer-use Agentic tasks in Real-World Professional Fields

articles.title: Reasoning Arena: Trace Tournaments When Verifiable Rewards Fall Short
articles.excerpt: Reinforcement learning with verifiable rewards (RLVR) has become a leading paradigm for improving the reasoning ability of large language models through outcome-based supervision. articles.summary: 针对RLVR中组级奖励无信息的问题，提出推理竞技场（Reasoning Arena），通过trace锦标赛机制在可验证奖励失效时仍提供有效梯度信号，提升模型推理能力。

articles.title: Latent Spatial Memory for Video World Models
articles.excerpt: Video world models that maintain 3D spatial consistency across generated frames typically rely on explicit point cloud memory constructed in RGB space. articles.summary: 提出潜在空间记忆机制，避免视频世界模型中RGB点云记忆的高计算开销，在潜在空间直接维持3D一致性，提升生成视频的几何保真度。

articles.summary: 发布OmniGameArena，基于UE5的统一游戏基准，支持商业/开源VLM和专用游戏策略的对比评估，引入改进动态而非单次分数。

articles.title: Rethinking the Divergence Regularization in LLM RL

articles.summary: 重新审视LLM强化学习中的散度正则化，指出PPO/GRPO的ratio-clipping机制的不足，提出更稳定的信任域控制方法以提升off-policy优化效果。

articles.title: Echo-Memory: A Controlled Study of Memory in Action World Models
articles.excerpt: We present Echo-Memory, a controlled study of memory mechanisms in action-conditioned world models. These models generate multi-segment videos from a first frame, text prompt, and camera-action sequence, but their central failure is often memory rather than local image synthesis: after the camera leaves and returns, the scene or salient object may silently change. articles.summary: Echo-Memory受控研究动作条件世界模型中的记忆机制，发现主要失败源于记忆而非局部图像合成，提出改进方案以保持场景一致性。

articles.title: SearchSwarm: Towards Delegation Intelligence in Agentic LLMs for Long-Horizon Deep Research
articles.excerpt: Large language models are increasingly expected to handle complex, long-horizon real-world tasks whose context demands can grow without bound, yet model context windows remain inherently finite. Recent work explores a paradigm where a main agent decomposes tasks and dispatches subtasks to subagents, which execute and return only summarized results, conserving the main agent's context budget. articles.summary: 提出SearchSwarm框架，让主代理分解复杂任务并委派给子代理，仅返回摘要结果以节省上下文预算，实现LLM对无限长上下文任务的深度研究。
